name: Chris Coons
stanceSummary: Coons has consistently affirmed Israel's right to self-defense while also pushing for ceasefire negotiations and expanded humanitarian assistance in Gaza through diplomatic channels. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: After meeting humanitarian NGOs, Coons highlighted urgency of aid delivery and civilian-protection concerns in Gaza.
Coons joined a statement warning that military escalation in Gaza would not end violence and calling for renewed ceasefire negotiations.
